title: Food business marketing website (Menu, About/Story, Contact)

requirements.text: Create a responsive multi-page marketing website for a food business with clear navigation and the following pages/sections: Home (hero + highlights), Menu (categorized items with name/description/price), About/Story (business story + values), and Contact (contact details + contact form). All user-facing text must be in English.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation allows switching between Home, Menu, About/Story, and Contact without page reload issues.
Menu page displays at least 3 categories and at least 3 items per category, each with name, short description, and price.
Contact page includes visible contact details (at minimum: phone and/or email and/or address placeholders) and a working contact form UI with validation messages in English.
Layout is mobile-friendly and remains readable and usable on small screens.

requirements.text: Implement a coherent visual theme for the food business site and apply it consistently across pages (color palette, typography, spacing, component styling). Do not use a blue/purple primary palette.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent header/footer styling, typography, and button/input styles.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; theme is clearly food/restaurant appropriate (e.g., warm neutrals, earthy tones, etc.).
The site has a polished, cohesive look with consistent spacing and section structure.

requirements.text: Add a contact form submission flow that persists submissions in the Motoko backend. The frontend should submit the form to the backend and show success/error feedback to the user.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form collects at least: name, email (or phone), and message.
Submitting the form stores the submission in the backend (in canister memory).
UI shows a success state after a successful submission and an error state if the backend call fails.
Basic client-side validation prevents empty required fields from being submitted.

requirements.text: Generate and include static image assets for the site (stored under frontend/public/assets/generated) and use them in the UI (e.g., a hero banner image and a simple logo mark). Do not serve these images from the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced directly by the frontend.
Home page uses the generated hero image in the hero section.
Site header/footer (or home hero) displays the generated logo image.

constraints: Use the pre-injected React + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn UI + React Query template.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths listed in system context; compose them instead.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (all logic in backend/main.mo).
Use English for all user-facing text.
nonGoals: Delivery tracking, live order status, or real-time chat.
Third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported, but not required for this marketing site).
External databases or third-party email/SMS sending integrations.

required: Food-themed hero banner image with appetizing plated food on a warm neutral background (hero-food.dim_1600x900.png)
Simple minimalist logo mark for a food business in warm earthy tones (logo-mark.dim_512x512.png)
